title: Technology Consulting
excerpt: Architecture, modernization, and technology strategy from a team that builds and operates platforms — advice grounded in production reality.

seo.title: Technology Consulting & Architecture | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion provides technology strategy, architecture review, and modernization consulting grounded in operating real platforms — not slideware.

benefits: Strategy grounded in operating real systems
Architecture reviews that find real risk
Stack and build-vs-buy decisions made with you

process.desc: Understand goals, constraints, and the current estate.
Architecture, risks, costs, and team capability.
A prioritised, pragmatic roadmap — not a wish list.
Help execute, or hand over a plan your team can run.

blocks.text: The best technology advice comes from people who still build and operate systems. Baalvion's consulting is grounded in running the [Baalvion Operating System](/platform) at scale, so our recommendations account for the realities of production — cost, reliability, team capability, and change over time. We help you choose, modernise, and scale without the abstraction that plagues slide-deck consulting.

items: **Grounded:** advice from a team that operates what it recommends.
**Honest architecture reviews** that surface real risk, not theatre.
**Pragmatic roadmaps** prioritised by value and risk.
**Clear decisions:** stack and build-vs-buy made with evidence.

blocks.text: We listen to your goals and constraints, assess your architecture, risks, and team capability, recommend a prioritised roadmap, and then either help execute or hand over a plan your team can own. For modernization-heavy engagements we draw on [enterprise modernization](/news/insights/enterprise-modernization) and the [digital transformation guide](/news/insights/digital-transformation-guide).

Architecture and security reviews, modernization roadmaps, stack selection, build-vs-buy analysis, technical due diligence, and team mentoring. Where execution follows, we bring our [custom software development](/services/custom-software-development), [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions), and [DevOps](/services/devops) practices.

We've made these decisions for our own platform and lived with the consequences, which keeps our advice honest. See the thinking in [choosing the right technology stack](/news/tech/choosing-the-right-technology-stack) and [scaling engineering teams](/news/insights/scaling-engineering-teams).

faqs.q: What does an architecture review cover?
faqs.a: Scalability, security, reliability, cost, and maintainability of your current architecture — with prioritised, actionable findings rather than a generic checklist.

faqs.q: Do you only advise, or also build?
faqs.a: Both. We can hand over a plan your team executes, or deliver it with you through our engineering practices.

faqs.q: Can you help with build-vs-buy decisions?
faqs.a: Yes — we weigh cost, control, time-to-value, and lock-in with you. See [custom software vs SaaS](/news/insights/custom-software-vs-saas).

faqs.q: Do you do technical due diligence?
faqs.a: Yes — for investors or acquirers, we assess architecture, risk, team, and scalability of a target's technology.
